name: voxbill
description: VoxBill — AI Voice Billing System for Restaurants

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND,AI" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow" "npm run backend" "npm run frontend" "npm run ai"
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND,AI" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow" "npm run backend:dev" "npm run frontend" "npm run ai"
